items.title_en: Osaka 'pays love and respect to Japan' in Wimbledon kimono

items.title_en: One big win and three defeats for Trump in dramatic day at Supreme Court
items.title_zh: 特朗普在最高法院戏剧性的一天取得了一场大胜和三场失败
items.desc_en: While Trump celebrated a ruling expanding presidential power to remove and replace regulators, other decisions were major setbacks.
items.desc_zh: 虽然特朗普庆祝扩大总统权力以罢免和更换监管机构的裁决，但其他决定却是重大挫折。

items.desc_en: A slew of Wall Street analysts initiated coverage of Applied Aerospace & Defense at an outperform- or buy-equivalent rating.
items.desc_zh: 许多华尔街分析师对应用航空航天与国防公司给予了优于大盘或买入的同等评级。

items.title_zh: 随着 Rocket Lab 的飙升，SpaceX 的多头们重新押注于巨大、快速的收益

items.title_en: Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
items.title_zh: 余震让人紧张，许多委内瑞拉人只能自生自灭
items.desc_en: In devastated areas people are using crowbars, pickaxes and their bare hands to try to reach survivors.
items.desc_zh: 在受灾地区，人们使用撬棍、镐和徒手试图接近幸存者。

items.title_en: Supreme Court lets presidents fire independent regulators, rules for Trump in FTC case
items.title_zh: 最高法院允许总统解雇独立监管人员，并在联邦贸易委员会案件中为特朗普制定规则
items.desc_en: The ruling allowing President Donald Trump to fire FTC Commissioner Rebecca Slaughter overturns a key precedent known as "Humphrey’s Executor."
items.desc_zh: 允许唐纳德·特朗普总统解雇联邦贸易委员会委员丽贝卡·斯劳特的裁决推翻了一个被称为“汉弗莱执行者”的重要先例。

items.title_en: South African leader warns anti-migrant protesters ahead of unofficial deadline
items.title_zh: 南非领导人在非官方截止日期之前警告反移民抗议者
items.desc_en: Thousands of people from other African countries have left South Africa ahead of Tuesday's deadline set by anti-migrant groups.
items.desc_zh: 来自其他非洲国家的数千人在反移民组织规定的周二最后期限之前离开南非。

items.title_en: Citi Wealth warns investors to move out of excess cash because of hot inflation
items.title_zh: 花旗财富警告投资者因通货膨胀过热而撤出多余现金

items.desc_zh: 花旗财富将把这笔钱投入其中，而不是短期工具。

items.title_en: Eli Lilly, Regeneron among first companies selected for FDA initiative to speed review of new manufacturing facilities

items.title_en: What's behind the Comcast break-up? Hope for a Disney-like valuation
items.title_zh: 康卡斯特解散的背后原因是什么？希望获得类似迪士尼的估值

items.desc_zh: 一位分析师表示，NBCUniversal 可能看起来像迪士尼，其市盈率是 10 倍。

items.title_en: WhatsApp to let people chat without swapping phone numbers
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 让人们无需交换电话号码即可聊天
items.desc_en: The app's new usernames feature will be rolled out globally over the next few months.
items.desc_zh: 该应用程序的新用户名功能将在未来几个月内在全球推出。

items.title_en: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook for now
items.title_zh: 最高法院裁定特朗普暂时不能解雇美联储理事丽莎·库克
items.desc_en: The ruling by the Supreme Court means that Lisa Cook will remain as a Federal Reserve governor as her lawsuit challenging Trump's effort to fire her proceeds.
items.desc_zh: 最高法院的裁决意味着丽莎·库克将继续担任美联储理事，她的诉讼质疑特朗普解雇她的收益的努力。

items.title_en: DR Congo bans mass gatherings in the  capital to prevent spread of Ebola
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国禁止在首都举行大规模集会，以防止埃博拉病毒传播
items.desc_en: Opposition politicians accuse the government of using the outbreak to halt a planned protest.
items.desc_zh: 反对派政客指责政府利用疫情爆发来阻止计划中的抗议活动。

items.title_en: Supreme Court blocks Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook
items.title_zh: 最高法院阻止特朗普解雇美联储理事丽莎库克的企图
items.desc_en: The decision, seen as a win for central bank independence, sends the fight over removal back to the lower courts.
items.desc_zh: 这一决定被视为央行独立性的胜利，将有关罢免的斗争送回下级法院。

items.title_en: Five dead following shooting at youth centre in Stade, northern Germany
items.title_zh: 德国北部施塔德青年中心发生枪击事件，造成五人死亡
items.desc_en: Two people have been arrested, one of whom is a suspect, police say.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，两人已被捕，其中一人是嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.title_en: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal
items.title_zh: 在 ICE 寻求 2.2 亿美元泰瑟枪交易之前，特朗普购买了价值 500 万美元的 Axon 股票
items.desc_en: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law-enforcement technology as ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.
items.desc_zh: 随着 ICE 寻求价值 2.2 亿美元的泰瑟枪交易，Axon Enterprise 加大了在国会有关联邦执法技术的游说力度。

items.title_en: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
items.title_zh: 美国表示已同意在与伊朗交锋后“退出”
items.desc_en: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.
